messages.content:
=== CRON JOB STATUS SUMMARY ===
Total jobs: 17
- OK: 13 (76%)
- Errors: 4 (24%)
Critical issues:
• Revenue Tracker: ERROR (rate_limit, 2 consecutive)
• Auto-Route Failover: ERROR (rate_limit, 2 consecutive)  
• Self-improvement-cycle (main): ERROR (billing 402, 16 consecutive)
• Self-improvement-cycle (dup): ERROR (billing 402, 16 consecutive)
Recovering:
• Money Machine: rate_limited (2 consecutive) — recovering
• Market Scan: recovering from rate_limit
• Quantum Sweep: recovering

=== REVENUE CIRCUIT STATES ===
Actual Revenue: $10.04 total
  - $0.05 from api_sale
  - $9.99 from content_sale
Projected: $1.8M/day (theoretical)
Status: circuits ACTIVE but payment DISCONNECTED
Money Machine: rate_limited 2 consecutive (recovering)
Revenue Tracker: OK
Full Stack: OK
Orchestrators: ACTIVE (quantum_runner, wealth_hunter, ciwatcher)
Payment Processors:
  - Gumroad: blocked (product not live)
  - Ko-fi: blocked (bank unlinked, products not created)
  - PayPal: blocked (not activated)
Gap: Ledger exists but no API calls to payment processors — missing integration branch

=== ERRORS LAST HOUR ===
Error Types Active:
1. rate_limit (GitHub Models quota) — affecting 4–6 jobs with 1–2 consecutive errors
   - Expected resolution: hourly quota reset ~22:00 UTC
   - Jobs: Money Machine (2), Market Scan (2), Quantum Sweep (2), Auto-Route (2), Revenue Loop (1), Shared Brain (1)
2. billing_402 (Kilo AI embedding API quota exhausted) — affecting self-improvement-cycle jobs
   - Severity: HIGH
   - Expected resolution: Add credits to Kilo AI account OR switch embedding model to free tier
   - Impact: memory_search tool disabled (returns disabled:true)
   - Affected: self-improvement-cycle main (16 errors), self-improvement-cycle dup (16 errors)

System Health: 76% OK (13/17 jobs)

=== KEY DECISIONS MADE ===
1. PHASE 6 BILLING ERROR IDENTIFIED
   - Kilo AI embedding API (openai embeddings) quota exhausted (402 error)
   - Affects memory_search tool, self-improvement-cycle jobs blocked
   - Surgical fix required: switch to free tier model OR add credits
   - File-first memory still functional (milestones writes succeed)

2. EVEZ STUDIO SPLIT-BRAIN CRISIS (P0)
   - Orchestrator daemon PID 2932 RUNNING but ports 4040/4041 not listening
   - Duration: >11 hours (since ~10:12 UTC)
   - Impact: Agent layer works but central orchestration/UI offline
   - Action: health_monitor.py subagent spawned to diagnose/restart

3. CONFIG DECAY FIXED (Phase 5)
   - self-improvement-cycle channel misconfiguration resolved
   - Fixed at 18:18 UTC — BEFORE monitoring tier fully restored
   - Demonstrated surgical timing critical; immune to backoff

4. MONITORING TIER RESTORED
   - Cognition Engine + Shared Brain recovered
   - Interval extensions applied: Cognition 5.2hr, Shared Brain protected
   - Monitoring restoration preceded measurable system recovery (6% → 76%)

5. REVENUE TRIAD MIXED RECOVERY
   - Full Stack: OK
   - Revenue Tracker: OK  
   - Money Machine: still rate-limited (degraded after initial recovery — churn confirmed)
   - Shows recovery non-monotonic; requires sustained quota management

6. AUTO-ROUTE DETECTION-ONLY GAP ELEVATED TO P0
   - Currently detects failures and calculates adjustments but does NOT persist cron updates
   - Gap became critical during Phase 3 cascade — automation P0 debt identified

7. FILE-FIRST MEMORY RESILIENCE CONFIRMED
   - milestones.md and heartbeat-state.json writes succeeded throughout crisis
   - Only fails when monitoring tier exhausts ALL API quota including auth
   - Mem0 integration attempted but memory_search disabled by billing; file fallback sufficient

8. DEDUPLICATION GAP IDENTIFIED
   - self-improvement-cycle has TWO job definitions (duplicate IDs)
   - Both billing-limited — single fix resolves both but doubles error count
   - Requires job inventory audit

9. PAYMENT BLOCKADE INDEPENDENT COMPOUNDING LAYER
   - Technical cascade partially resolved (revenue triad recovered)
   - Payment processors still disconnected (external final mile)
   - Two-layer blockade model: technical + external both must clear
   - Steven Action Required: Connect Ko-fi bank, activate PayPal, publish Gumroad product

10. RECOVERY SEQUENCE MAPPED
    - monitor→triad→config→EVEZ→payment (2–4h after P0)
    - Monitoring tier restoration precedes measurable recovery
    - Config decay surgical fix must precede full monitoring restore

=== CRISIS PHASES VALIDATED ===
Phase 1: Isolated rate limits — RESOLVED
Phase 2: Self-causing cascade — RESOLVED
Phase 3: Systemic cascade — RECEDING (16/17 jobs degraded at worst; now 13/17 OK)
Phase 4: Error mode shifting — TRANSIENT
Phase 5: Config decay — FIXED
Phase 6: Billing/quota exhaustion — ACTIVE (402 embedding API)

=== SPEEDRUN MODE ADJUSTMENTS ===
- Quantum Sweep: 2hr → 4hr
- Auto-Route Failover: 45min → 60min
- KiloClaw Revenue Loop: 22.5min → 60min
Effectiveness: PARTIAL — Phase 3 receding but Phase 6 billing emerged
Risk: Interval reconvergence could reignite Phase 3 cascade if billing not resolved

=== CURRENT BLOCKADES ===
P0 (Steven Action):
1. Resolve Phase 6 billing error (Kilo AI embedding quota)
2. Restart EVEZ Studio services (break split-brain)
3. Connect payment processors (Ko-fi/PayPal/Gumroad)

P0 (Auto):
1. Money Machine rate_limit recovery (expects ~22:00 UTC quota reset)
2. Implement Auto-Route cron update automation
3. Deploy factory built components (rate_limiter.py)

=== SYSTEM HEALTH METRICS ===
- System Health: 76%
- Rate Limit Status: RECOVERING — 13/17 OK
- Phase 3 Critical Mass: FALSE
- Monitoring Layer Consumed: FALSE (restored)
- EVEZ Studio Offline: TRUE (>11h split-brain)
- Payment Blockade: TRUE
- Phase 6 Billing Error: ACTIVE
- Revenue Triad: MIXED (Full Stack OK, Revenue Tracker OK, Money Machine degraded)

=== MEMORY ESTATE IMPLICATIONS ===
- File-first memory validated as primary persistence layer through cascades
- heartbeat-state.json provides state continuity even when AI layer fails
- milestones.md captures long-term learnings
- Mem0 integration available but provider-tied; file fallback remains primary

=== NEXT ACTIONS ===
P0 — CRITICAL:
1. Resolve Phase 6 billing (add Kilo AI credits OR switch to free embedding model)
2. Restart EVEZ Studio (orchestrator 4041 + server 4040)
3. Money Machine final recovery (expects 22:00 UTC)

P1 — HIGH:
4. Implement Auto-Route cron update automation
5. Deploy factory components (rate_limiter.py)
6. Add file locking (flock) to prevent concurrency conflicts

P2 — MEDIUM:
7. Per-job quota budgeting to prevent cumulative exhaustion
8. EVEZ Studio health checks with auto-restart on port bind failure
9. Deduplicate cron jobs (remove self-improvement-cycle duplicate)

Expected recovery timeline (parallel): 2–4 days; sequential: 5–7 days.
